title: Desertion at Dawn
writer: Akira Kurosawa, Taijirô Tamura, Senkichi Taniguchi
actors: Ryô Ikebe, Shirley Yamaguchi, Eitarô Ozawa
plot: Mikami, a Japanese soldier serving in China, is captured by the Chinese. Although he is able to escape, his troubles are far from over. He returns to his unit but is treated with contempt for the disgrace of having been captured. ...
